name: daudit
description: Grid-style directory audit that reports directory names and sizes in MB, with optional max-depth control. See #assets/payloads/DIRECTORIES/daudit.

prompts: Enter max depth (Press Enter for Infinity)

outputs: Formats each line with a directory icon

behavior.help_mode: Shows usage and explanation when invoked with -h or no argument
behavior.depth_control: Uses -maxdepth only when the user enters a value
behavior.scan_mode: Recursively finds directories under the target path
behavior.rendering: Prints a directory icon and the human-readable size

notes: The script computes the basename but does not currently print it
The commented gridify pipeline suggests future column formatting
